overrides.expect: n _ {i j} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text {if v_{i} is the tail of a_{j}} \\ 0 & \text {otherwise} \end{array} \right.

\begin{array}{l} b _ {i} := \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 0 & \text { if } 1 \leq i \leq n \\ 1 & \text { otherwise } \end{array} \right. \\ c _ {j} := \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} 1 & \text { if   a_{j } is a reverse arc} \\ 0 & \text { otherwise} \end{array} \right. \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} b_{i}:=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}0&\text{ if }1\leq i\leq n\\1&\text{ otherwise }\end{array}\right. \\ c_{j}:=\left\{\begin{array}{ll}1&\text{ if }a_{j}\text{ is a reverse arc}\\0&\text{ otherwise}\end{array}\right. \\ \end{array}
